title: Excavators by Juix
description: Datapack adding shovels that dig 3x3 (or more)
body:
# ℹ️ Excavators By Juix The Excavators pack will simply add excavators to your game, which are large shovels that allow you to dig 3x3 holes ! This is perfect for terraforming or sand farming. You have to download my resource pack to enjoy the custom textures !

![Intro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/624490cb28d0736ee479dde4e10e13c467ae68d3.webp) # ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.6] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.6+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)
# ⚒️ Recipes Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) You can craft excavators this way :

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a5a625093a498500755b6f327915bb8fd21bc22.png)
# 🆕 Features & Options - **_/function datapack:excavators_datapack/change_mining_power_** | To customize Excavators mining size & depth such as 3x3x2, 3x3x3, 5x5x1, 5x5x2, 5x5x3 mining
- **_/function datapack:juix_datapacks/toggle_sneak_bypass_** | To enable or disable (disabled by default) Sneak bypass (excavators stop working when sneaking)
# 🪳 Known issues - This pack relies on item drop coordinates, please be careful with Magnet mods for example (Magnets by Juix is fully compatible with Excavators) Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
